a.xlink:title: putting a client as observer in the server
Sets the current amount of resource the given entity will have.
Called when a client spawns in the server.
Sets the current amount of resource the given entity will have.
Gives to or takes from an entity resource.
Gives an entity some resource but not more than a limit.
Gives to or takes from an entity resource but not more/less than a limit.
Takes an entity some resource but not less than a limit.
Takes an entity some resource but not less than a limit.
